actor_claims.quote_text: Argos Holdings Inc. is a Delaware corporation.
Argos Merger Sub Inc. is a Delaware corporation and a wholly owned subsidiary of Parent.

Parent and Merger Sub are affiliates of funds advised by BC Partners, Inc. and at the closing of the transactions contemplated by the merger agreement will be owned by a consortium comprised of funds advised by BC Partners, Inc., La Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec, affiliates of GIC Special Investments Pte Ltd, affiliates of StepStone Group LP and Longview.
